testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
20:14:23.549 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [projet_club_escalade.ProjetClubEscaladeApplicationTests]: ProjetClubEscaladeApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 20:14:23.638 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration projet_club_escalade.ProjetClubEscaladeApplication for test class projet_club_escalade.ProjetClubEscaladeApplicationTests 20:14:23.693 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [projet_club_escalade.ProjetClubEscaladeApplicationTests]: ProjetClubEscaladeApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 20:14:23.694 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration projet_club_escalade.ProjetClubEscaladeApplication for test class projet_club_escalade.ProjetClubEscaladeApplicationTests

2026-04-15T20:14:28.254+02:00 INFO 10703 --- [projet_club_escalade] [ main] p.ProjetClubEscaladeApplicationTests : Started ProjetClubEscaladeApplicationTests in 4.502 seconds (process running for 5.377) 2026-04-15T20:14:28.255+02:00 DEBUG 10703 --- [projet_club_escalade] [ main] o.s.b.a.ApplicationAvailabilityBean : Application availability state LivenessState changed to CORRECT 2026-04-15T20:14:28.259+02:00 DEBUG 10703 --- [projet_club_escalade] [ main] o.s.b.a.ApplicationAvailabilityBean : Application availability state ReadinessState changed to ACCEPTING_TRAFFIC
testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (/Users/mohammedtd/.m2/repository/net/bytebuddy/byte-buddy-agent/1.17.8/byte-buddy-agent-1.17.8.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release
